character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A gaunt shadow-caster in layered near-black robes with deep-purple undercloak, hood drawn low casting face in darkness — only sharp pale chin and cold glowing pale-violet eyes visible. Tall crooked obsidian staff topped with a shard of black ice. Skeletal hands protruding from long sleeves. Tendrils of shadow and frost creeping from hem of robe across the ground. Breath visible as frost. Palette: near-black `#0A0A1A`, shadow purple `#3A2A4A`, muted lilac `#7A6A8A`. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
